# Project Configuration

## Platform
- **Host:** GitHub
- **CLI:** gh
- **Remote:** git@github.com:Wave-Engineering/squawkie-talkie.git

## Branching
- **Default branch:** main
- **Merge strategy:** squash

## Status Mechanism
- **Type:** label-based
- **Agent instruction:** Set status by adding/removing `status::*` labels via `gh issue edit <N> --add-label "status::in-progress" --remove-label "status::todo"`. (Status label taxonomy not yet provisioned — create with `/issue` or `label_create` when wave work begins.)

## Existing Labels
<!-- Labels in use on this repo — do not conflict -->
Default GitHub set only (no `group::value` taxonomy yet):
- bug — Something isn't working
- documentation — Improvements or additions to documentation
- duplicate — This issue or pull request already exists
- enhancement — New feature or request
- good first issue — Good for newcomers
- help wanted — Extra attention is needed
- invalid — This doesn't seem right
- question — Further information is requested
- wontfix — This will not be worked on

## Toolchain
- **Validation:** none
- **Tests:** none
- **Build:** none
- **Lint:** none discovered

## CI
- **System:** none
- **Config:** none (no `.github/workflows/`, no `.gitlab-ci.yml`)
